hotel_name: Homestay Vân Đức Cù Lao Chàm (Homestay Van Đuc Cu Lao Cham)

reviews.title: If you are looking for a clean place, go somewhere else.
reviews.text: I was given a room different from the pictures. And since the room is the size of a goshiwon, I couldn't place my carrier. The chickens in the backyard start crowing from 4 AM. I couldn't sleep. Renting a motorcycle costs 200,000 dong per day. I had to stay there because I was in a hurry, but it was a struggle. Go to Monkey Homestay. It's the cleanest place.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The host was really accommodating (despite not being able to speak English). She collected us from the pier when we arrived, arranged a snorkelling trip for us and made a huge meal ( which we were barely able to make a dent in). We were always greeted with a smile. The location was great - close enough to walk to the stunning sandy beach on the right hand side and minutes from the main area also. All the essentials are also available to purchase at the homestay which is an added bonus.
reviews.negatives: Nothing to do with the host or the property at all but probably would not recommend the snorkelling - not much to see and when we asked the man to bring us to another location for more snorkelling he just brought us back. The snorkelling location was minutes from the pier and was at a beach that could have been reached easily by road.

reviews.title: Lovely stay
reviews.text: The first room we stayed in (the room advertised online) was lovely. The family that stay there are very nice and caring. On the second night we were moved into another room, I feel like all the rooms are all very similar apart from the one advertised. This room unfortunately had very hard mattresses and was not as beautiful as the one you get on the picture. Value for money It's okay but don't expect the nice room for your money.

reviews.title: Lovely, simple homestay.
reviews.positives:
Location is great - easy walk from the drop off pier and the many restaurants around the harbour.
Nice view of the mountains. Pretty quiet, which was great. Owners were lovely. However, non VN-speakers should note that their English is very limited.
reviews.negatives: Mattresses are a bit hard but that is not unusual in Vietnam.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very warm and welcoming family. Amazing food, comfortable space and beds. Very delicious food, make sure to order your breakfast and dinner the night before, as everything is bought fresh and early in the morning. This is an island, the food comes straight from the ocean into your belly. They have an additional business, Chill Coffee that offers the most amazing drinks and coffee, served at the homestay or across the road at the cafe. Ensure to book travel to and from the island with owners, as they will offer you the best deal.

reviews.title: Excellent stay with very nice hosts
reviews.positives: Very nice homestay. The hosts are exceptionally nice, communicated well, gave me free snorkeling glasses and even brought me back to the port when leaving the island. The place was absolutely clean. The room had air conditioning. You can shower warm which turns on immediately. I can absolutely recommend this place.
reviews.negatives: I got a different room which was smaller and without balcony which was the main reason why I booked at this place. Always not so good when you are downgraded. I still give 9 stars because the hosts were so nice and tried everything to make me have a great stay which I had.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Friendly host, Ms. Van cooks delicious food; lends motorbikes for free. Very enthusiastic guidance.

reviews.title: Fantastic people plus comfort = 10/10
reviews.positives: Vân Ðức was just wonderful. They welcomed us so warmly and took care of all our logistics; making sure we didn’t miss our boat when the schedule changed. From offering snacks and gifts, to arranging a private tour, and giving us all rides on their bikes, the hospitality made this a 10/10 stay. We loved it! Thanks so much, Vân Đức! ❤️

reviews.title: Wonderful vacation
reviews.text:
Food in homestay is so delicious, fresh and healthy.
Mrs Van the host is really the best chef!
Hosts are friendly.
It’s easy to find beautiful beach nearby.
Wish that we could comeback here!

reviews.title: Very friendly and supportive experience!
reviews.positives: Friendliness and inclusion!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I recommend this place

reviews.title: Great value and authentic stay with a kind family
reviews.positives: Very kind family running this home stay. Amazing dinner - make sure you order it when you are there - great value and relaxing location.

reviews.title: Cham islands
reviews.text: Lovely Homestay family so helpful and kind. Good food too. Can rent scooters & will help with ferries. Thank you!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The location is close to the dock. Nice balcony with a view of the water.  Host was helpful and offered transportation.
reviews.negatives: Room was pretty tight. But didn’t bother me too much.  Mattress was pretty hard even for someone that likes a firm mattress.

reviews.title: 최고의 선택
reviews.text:
3일 동안 머물렀다.
선착장에서 멀지 않은 거리에 있어서 편리했다. 
선착장에서 도보로 5분 정도의 거리였다. 
시끌벅적한 바닷가보다 조용해서 좋았다. 
특히 홈스테이 여사장님이 매우 친절했다. 
숙소에서 식사도 가능한 데 저렴한 데다 정성이 들어간 현지 음식이라 맛있었다. 
매일 아침 저녁은 숙소의 식사를 이용했다. 
스쿠터도 갖고 있어서 휘발유를 넣어주고 하루에 15만 동 씩 3일 간 사용했다. 
섬 구석구석을 돌아봤다. 
섬 문화를 체험하기 위해 사장님의 부모님과도 인터뷰했다. 
7대째 꾸라오 참에 살고 있는 할아버지는 섬의 역사와 문화에 대해 구수하게 이야기 해줬다.
현지 주민들의 정겨운 삶을 체험하고 싶은 분들께 이 숙소를 적극 추천한다.
다시 꾸라오 참에 간다면 이 숙소를 또 이용하고 싶다.

reviews.title: I enjoyed my stay, and would stay there again
reviews.positives: A quaint Island victorian home, the four homestay rooms are upstairs with private baths and are very comfortable. there is a sitting area and the beautiful veranda.
reviews.negatives: nothing to dislike

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Friendly host, location very convenient close to the center.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: La ubicación
reviews.negatives: El calentador estaba roto

reviews.title: Nice place
reviews.text: We are recomend

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: La ubicación en un lugar muy tranquilo
reviews.negatives:
La habitación y el baño demasiado básicos.
El desayuno no sale por 1 euro como dice Booking,, sino por 100000 vnd

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Perfect staff :)

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Está bastante cerca del puerto y de varias playas a las que se puede llegar caminando, la mujer del hostel es muy amable y te ayuda con lo que necesites
reviews.negatives: Inexistente la diferencia entre el suelo y la cama, pero bueno dormí bien

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Clean accommodation, friendly host.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: La anfitriona del alojamiento es un encanto, te ayuda con todo. Los desayunos excelentes!

reviews.title: Es un alojamiento básico
reviews.text:
La dueña es muy simpática y muy servicial.
Camas muy duras e instalaciones muy básicas pero para una noche puede servir.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Mujer local de la isla Cham muy cercana. Nos ofreció cenar con su familia, nos dejó la moto a muy buen precio y también nos dejó gafas para hacer snorkel.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Es una familia encantadora, te ayudan en todo lo que pueden y son súper serviciales. Estuvimos muy contentos las dos noches que nos hospedamos ahí

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Los dueños son muy amables, nos ayudaron a gestionar los billetes de barco y vinieron a recogernos y a llevarnos al puerto. Aunque no hablan inglés con el traductor te entiendes. Tienen motos para alquilar y nos dejaron gafas de snorkel.
El balconcito y la terraza que tienen son muy agradables. El desayuno con café Vietnamita estaba muy bueno. Sin duda recomendable.
reviews.negatives: Las camas era un poco duras (aunque para nosotros no fue un gran problema).

reviews.title: Magnífico Homestay.
reviews.text: La experiencia en el Homestay ha sido fantástica, la atención recibida por la familia fue fenomenal, son muy amables y atentos, además, puedes alquilar Moto con ellos directamente y tienen u cena riquísima y económica, es 100% recomendable.

reviews.title: Muy acogedor!
reviews.positives: Muy limpio y muy majos
reviews.negatives: Las motos han tenido mejores días

reviews.title: Lieux magnifiques
reviews.text:
On apasser 6 jours merveilleux sur l'île Cham
Les gens de l'hôtel nous on aider avec une motos. On fais notre lessive sur place et la plage est a 5 min a pied. Parfait quand on voyage avec un bebe de 2 ans

reviews.title: Vale la pena aunque sea por la experiencia
reviews.positives: La verdad que nos recibieron con las manos abiertas,son una familia humilde que nos ayudaron en todo,nos dejaron una moto también,nos cocino la mujer lo que quisimos. No se la verdad que nunca vi tanto interés en que estuviéramos bien atendidos,los precios muy bajos en todo,la isla muy bonita,playas bonitas.
reviews.negatives: La habitación tenia algo de humedad,y el baño un poco pobre,pero por el dinero que nos cobró,tampoco se podía pedir mucho más. Hay que tener cuidado con dejar los zapatos afuera porque hay arañas muy grandes y se cuelan en los zapatos

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Un accueil chaleureux on se sent en famille. C'est simple mais  confortable et propre.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Auténtico homestay en la isla de Cham. Está muy bien ubicado y la familia que lo lleva es encantadora. Aunque no hablan inglés te puedes arreglar perfectamente porque siempre están dispuestos a ayudar. Puedes alquilar moto en el alojamiento. El desayuno está muy bueno. La habitación es humilde pero está limpia y con baño privado.

reviews.title: Super friendly hosts
reviews.text: It was a lovely stay. We had to use translator for communication. Room category was changed without telling in advance. The hosts were super friendly and welcoming. They helped with everything and I could get a local experience at quiet and peaceful place.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: La ubicación, la familia.
reviews.negatives: El agua caliente no iba muy bien.

reviews.title: Everything you need, nothing you don’t
reviews.text: Spotless, perfectly located, with a wonderful terrace and one of the warmest hosts I’ve encountered. No frills, no disappointments — just a great stay on a beautiful island. Highly recommended!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Bien ubicado, el personal no habla muy bien inglés pero son muy majos siempre dispuestos a ayudarte , las habitaciones limpias , la cama muy cómoda

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Struttura semplice ma con rapporto prezzo/qualità spettacolare. I ragazzi che la gestiscono sono gentilissimi e sempre disponibili per ogni necessità. Cu Lao Cham è un posto incredibile e spero di tornarci presto. Grazie ragazzi

reviews.title: Un entorno fascinante y los anfitriones nos facilitaron mucho la estancia
reviews.positives: La ubicación y la comida. Los anfitriones fueron muy amables e incluso nos dejaron unas gafas para bucear y nos facilitaron el alquiler de moto

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Chủ home dễ thương nhiệt tình, phòng sạch sẽ gần các điểm đi chơi

reviews.title: Muy recomendable lugar para descansar y disfrutar de la Isla
reviews.positives: Tuvimos una muy linda estadía en la casa de esta adorable familia. Un cuarto muy lindo y cómodo, con aire acondicionado y ventilador. Desde el balcón se puede ver el mar!! La ubicación del Homestay es ideal ya que esta a 5 minutos caminando de lo que para nosotros es la playa mas linda de toda la isla. Los dueños nos prestaron el equipo de snorkel y nos ayudaron con el alquiler de un scooter para recorrer la isla.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Домашняя атмосфера, внимательные и приветливые хозяева, хорошее расположение. Есть аренда мопедов. Комната небольшая, но удобная и чистая.

reviews.title: Super prix et propriétaires sympas
reviews.positives:
Guesthouse avec des propriétaires très sympas et aidant. Pour passer une nuit sur l'île à petit prix, je recommande. 
Pensez à dormir sur l'île, car les excursions à la journée sont bien trop courtes pour profiter de l'île. A 14h, quand les touristes à la journée sont partis, l'île est calme et c'est super.
Le guesthouse est à moins de 5 min du port, le propriétaire vous cherche en scooter vous et vos valises.
reviews.negatives: La chambre double est petite mais pour une nuit et au vu du prix aucun souci.

reviews.title: Good value for the money
reviews.text: The homestay will cover your basic needs and can be considered a good value for the money. The host is really nice, we got free tea when we arrived, we could lend snorkeling gear for free and got served breakfast each morning for 40 VND. The homestay is close to a very beautiful beach and a 5 min walk from town.

reviews.title: Merci pour la chaleur de votre accueil
reviews.positives: La famille très accueillante, elle est même venue nous chercher en scooter au port alors que c'est à côté, les repas et le petit déjeuner fait par la famille, l'emplacement proche du port et proche de la mer
reviews.negatives:
Pour 3 la chambre était vraiment petite
La literie très dure 
Mais on a passé un très bon sejour

reviews.title: Excellent séjour en famille !
reviews.positives:
L’accueil et la configuration du Homestay permettant le séjour d’une famille de 5 personnes dans de bonnes conditions. 
La possibilité de déléguer l’achat des billets de bateau à un prix avantageux, de venir se faire chercher au port à l’arrivée et d’avoir un contact pour commander un taxi une fois le séjour terminé.
reviews.negatives: La nécessité d’utiliser un traducteur électronique pour communiquer avec les propriétaires.

reviews.title: Séjour sympa à Cham Island
reviews.positives:
Très sympa pour visiter Cham Island.
Les hôtes louent des scooters à bon prix et parlent anglais. De plus ils nous ont organisé une sortie pour faire du snorkelling.

reviews.title: famille adorable, très serviable et vraiment au petit soin pour nous. plages magnifiques
reviews.positives: la famille était adorable, et a fait le maximum pour qu'on se sente bien chez eux. Les plages sont magnifiques.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Bien placé. Malgré un sommier assez dur , on a très bien dormi , pour le prix rien à dire . La chambre petite mais ca le fait . Le personnel au  top ! Elle vous  prête des masques tuba pour la plongée. La loc des scooter pas chère
reviews.negatives: Rien de particulier

reviews.title: Des hôtes parfaits
reviews.positives: Nous avons passé deux nuits dans cet hébergement. Les propriétaires sont tellement gentils et accueillants. La nourriture préparée sur place est délicieuse et a facilité grandement notre séjour. L'eau de la douche est abondante et chaude. La communication avec notre hôte a été chaleureuse. Il a été très aidant et toujours disponible. La location d'un scooter sur place est aussi un bel avantage. Nous recommandons fortement d'y passer votre séjour sur l'île. Merci encore pour tout !
reviews.negatives: La chambre est confortable bien que les lits soient plutôt fermes.

reviews.title: Un moment convivial dans un lieu authentique.
reviews.positives: La gentillesse et l’accueil d’une famille très souriante . La balade en bateau local du fils pour faire du snorkling . L’authenticité et la simplicité du lieu.
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Trois jours super reposants à l’écart du circuit principal des touristes.
reviews.positives:
Accueil chaleureux par Vanh et sa famille. 
Ils étaient très accueillant et nous ont aidé pour organiser une sortie en bateau pour faire de la plongée avec masque et tuba. Sortie matinale pour admirer le lever de soleil sur la mer en plus. 
Petit « homestay » basique mais fortement recommandable.
reviews.negatives: Plutôt une suggestion : Demandez une chambre à l’étage, si possible. La petite terrasse avec vue sur le port est très chouette.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Très bon rapport qualité/prix. L'hostel est à 5 minutes à pied du port. Bonne literie dans la chambre avec deux lits doubles et salle de bain très propre. La mère de famille a été très accueillante et disponible durant tout notre séjour. Nous avons adoré ses beignets à la banane au petit-déjeuner et elle nous a gentiment prêté un masque et un tuba.

reviews.title: Une famille adorable avec un emplacement parfait
reviews.positives:
Tout était parfait, l’emplacement a 7 min à pied du centre ville mais assez en retrait pour avoir du calme et a 2 pas de la plage sans personne 
Le lit très confortable la gentillesse de la famille du homestay leur recommandations 
Excellent rapport qualité prix je recommande !
reviews.negatives:
Rien 
La chambre est un tout petit peu humide il faudrait trouver un moyen de l’aérer plus et la salle de bain = le strict minimum 
Mais ce n’est pas du tout gênant pour quelques nuits !

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Génial ! 
Une ambiance super accueillant et une propreté impeccable ! 
Nous somme ravis de notre séjour ! 
D'autant plus qu'il nous ont proposer un tour de moto pour le lever du soleil ! 

Merci pour tout !

reviews.title: Pris en charge depuis le bateau , repas et petit cadeau au départ nous nous sommes promis de revenir ! Trop court , à re
reviews.positives: L’accueil, le sérieux le sourire la gentillesse et la bienveillance
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
La famille est absolument attachante et toujours disponible.
Tout est mis à disposition :
Petit déjeuner et dîner (mention spéciale pour les beignets de banane !) 
Location de scooter 
Prêt de masque et tuba 
Le tout pour un prix par nuit vraiment pas cher !

reviews.title: Magnifique homestay
reviews.positives: Super homestay, chambre très propre et très confortable (avec climatisation!!). La localisation est idéal, proche du port et des plages. Et surtout la famille qui gère l’endroit est super sympathique et toujours prête à rendre service : j’ai été grandement aidé pour venir jusqu’à l’île en bateau. Je recommande ++

reviews.title: Best homestay
reviews.positives:
Le personnel ou plutôt cette merveilleuse famille étaient super accueillants, souriants et généreux ! 
Ils nous donnaient des adresses où se rendre, ont été à l’écoute et patients. La chambre était très propre, il y avait de quoi se laver, très peu de bruit et en plus il y avait un balcon. JE RECOMMANDE
reviews.negatives: Tout était parfait, nous avons adoré le séjour !!!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Les propriétaires sont adorables et se sont très bien occupé de nous malgré la barrière de la langue. Nous avons été ravis. L'emplacement est top, proche du port et à 10min à pieds de la plus grande plage. Le petit déjeuner et les repas sont délicieux. Le lit était confortable et la climatisation et ventilateur fonctionnent bien. Le balcon avec vue sur la mer au loin, idéal pour se détendre. 
Petit plus pour leur aide pour réserver le bateau et le pick up à notre arrivée.
reviews.negatives: La pomme de douche était défectueuse et pourrait être changée mais rien de trop gênant.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Un chaleureux accueil, un vrai homestay, Van est une excellente cuisinière qui est à l'écoute et a fait le maximum pour rendre notre séjour agréable et intéressant malgré la météo. Duc est pêcheur et on a profité de sa pêche. Un endroit que l'on recommande pour son authenticité.
reviews.negatives: Tout nous a plu.

reviews.title: Super !
reviews.positives:
Super, personnel adorable et très arrangeant ! Lits confortables et localisation très bien ! 
Rien à dire :)
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
La gentillesse et la disponibilité de Van et de sa famille, toujours prêts à rendre service. 
La proximité avec le port, la mer, un magnifique temple. 
Le p'tit déjeuner copieux et préparé par Van pour nous faire plaisir. 
Le rapport qualité-prix: ce n'est pas un hôtel étoilé, il faut le savoir, mais le confort permis par les hôtes rend le rapport qualité prix très intéressant. 
Nous vous conseillons le tour de l'île en scooters loués sur place et avec Van!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Des gens très sympa vous accueil et qui vous rendent service je recommande. Le garçon m'a bien rendu service en me ramenant pour prendre le bateau avec ma valise ...sans question d'argent...des gens simple comme je les aime ❤️ C'est pas grand luxe mais grand coeur

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nous avons été très bien reçu, avec une sincère gentillesse par notre hôte et ses enfants. Jours de pluie, nous avions un espace cosy pour nous abriter et travailler (tables, chaises) dans un espace au calme. Elle et sa fille faisaient des petites fleurs en kraft, elles nous ont invité à les rejoindre et adorablement, elles nous en ont offert deux ! Nous avons apprecié ses bons petits plats pour un ptit prix et ses beaux sourires ❤️ Nous sommes ravis de ce séjour et recommandons chaleureusement leurs chambres.

reviews.title: Famille adorable , emplacement idéal pour profiter des restaurants, bars et de la plage
reviews.positives:
La gentillesse des habitants du Homestay
L’emplacement

reviews.title: Super séjour!
reviews.positives:
Les hôtes étaient très sympas et serviables
Ils nous ont renseignés pour plusieurs choses et nous ont aidé à retirer de l’argent sur place. De plus ils nous ont offert un porte-clés à la fin du séjour!:)
Ils nous ont aussi prêté du matériel de snorkeling.

reviews.title: Séjour ressourçant Charme Soleil calme
reviews.positives:
Établissement calme et paisible idéalement bien placé.
Mme Van Duc est une très très bonne cuisinière ses plats sont excellents le prix est plus que raisonnable avec entrée plat dessert on trouve cela nul part ailleurs sur l’île.
Toute la famille Van Duc est adorable serviable et bienveillante.Ne vous attendez pas au grand luxe ici on dort et vie comme l’habitant et c’est ce qui fait le charme du voyage. On a prolongé notre séjour à 6 jours et vraiment nous sommes repartis le cœur le corps et l’esprit charmé et grandis par ce séjour et en leur compagnie.
Nous vous recommandons l’établissement et sa richesse culinaire.

reviews.title: Wir waren extrem enttäuscht; hatten Entspannung erwartet und das Gegenteil erlebt.
reviews.positives: Wir konnten direkt zwei der Zimmer bekommen, als wir morgens ankamen.
reviews.negatives:
Das Appartement entsprach nicht der Beschreibung. Es bestand aus drei Doppelzimmern, die sonst einzeln vermietet werden und einem kleinen Sitzbereich davor mit harten Bänken und zu niedrigem Tisch.
Es hatte keine Küche wie angegeben, auch keinen Kühlschrank oder Wasserkocher oder auch kein Geschirr. Wir durften zwar den Kühlschrank der Familie im Erdgeschoss mitbenutzen, der aber abends abgeschlossen wurde, ebenso den Wasserkocher mitbenutzen, der aber später wieder von der Familie zurückgeholt wurde.
Auch die Ausstattung der Zimmer war sehr dürftig, in zwei Zimmern konnte man die Fenster nicht komplett schließen, die Duschen setzten jeweils die Badezimmerböden unter Wasser. Die Betten waren sehr hart.
Das Schlimmste war der allabendliche Lärm der Karaoke Sänger, auch tagsüber dudelte ständig von irgendwo ein Radio aus der Nachbarschaft.
Mit dem Sohn der Familie ist lediglich einen Kommunikation mit dem Translator über das Mobile möglich. Die Preise für das Abendessen wurden mit 120 Dong angegeben, am Ende wurden jedoch 150 Dong pro Essen verlangt. Ein von mir eindeutig kommunizierter, kurzer Ausflug zum Schnorcheln mit dem Motorroller als Begleitfahrerin wurde künstlich ausgedehnt zu einer zusätzlichen Tour über die Insel (insgesamt inkl. Schnorcheln ca. 1,5 Std.) und am Ende wurde auch dafür ein vergleichsweise zu hoher Preis berechnet. Achtung: Die laut Sohn angeblich beste Schnorchelstelle bescherte mir keinen einigen Fisch!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Es wurde uns geholfen, die Tickets für das Speedboot zu reservieren,  das war super...danke hierfür.
reviews.negatives: Es war nicht sauber, überall steht irgendein Krusch, alles wackelt,wir bekamen die letzte Kammer, erst am Tag der Abreise wurde uns ein besseres Zimmer angeboten und die Familie war plötzlich sehr zugewandt.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives:
Da die anderen beiden Doppelzimmer zu unserer Zeit nicht belegt waren, konnten wir die Etage alleine nutzen, was dann sehr angenehm war.

Die Besitzerin empfing uns sehr freundlich, aber aufgrund der Sprachbariere war keine Kommunikation möglich.
reviews.negatives:
Kein Apartment wie bei Booking beschrieben, sondern es sind drei Doppelzimmer mit Dusche und diese drei Zimmer teilen sich den  Wohnbereich und Balkon. 
Entgegen der Angabe bei Booking.com:
Es gab keine Küche und keinen Kühlschrank.
Es gab keinen hauseigenen Strand (10 Min Fußweg)
Es wurde kein Englisch gesprochen

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Die Familie ist sehr nett und hat sich um alles gekümmert. Frühstück war inbegriffen, zusätzlich konnte wir dort Mittag-Und Abendessen (gegen Bezahlung). Dafür lohnt es sich jedoch auch in die Stadt zu gehen. 
Zu empfehlen ist die Schnorcheltour! Der Sohn des Hauses hatte uns in einem Mini-Boot zum schnorcheln gepaddelt (weiter weg von den größeren Booten mit 20-50 Touristen am Board) und wir waren über 1h im Wasser und konnten ausgiebig schnorcheln. Wir konnten uns mit dem Motorbike irgendwo hinbringen und abholen lassen.
reviews.negatives: Kommunikation lief größtenteils über Google-Translator, da die Hosts wenig englisch konnten. Es hat aber trotzdem alles immer gut geklappt.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Super freundlich, großartige Lage, Balkon mit schöner Sicht, Leihen der Motorroller war problemlos
reviews.negatives: Die Luft im Zimmer war etwas stickig

reviews.title: Wir kommen gerne wieder:)
reviews.positives: Wunderschöne Lage, mit Terrasse und Meerblick. Sehr herzliche Gastgeberin, die super kocht, sich um alles kümmert, bei der man Schnorcheln, Tauchen und einen Roller mieten kann. Gerne wieder:)
reviews.negatives: Sehr kleine Zimmer, wenig Ablageflächen, Bett nicht super sauber, aber völlig in Ordnung:)

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Wir hatten ein Zimmer in der ersten Etage links mit zwei Doppelbetten ohne Größenangabe und Fotos gebucht. Die beiden Doppelbetten füllten das Zimmer fast komplett aus, so daß es sehr schwierig war, unsere Fahrradtaschen unterzubringen. Die Klimaanlage hat ziemlich laut gebrummt.
Es gibt jedoch eine wunderschöne Terrasse mit Wasserkocher und Gestell zum Wäschetrocknen, und wir konnten die Waschmaschine benutzen.
Es gab kostenlos abgefülltes Trinkwasser. 
Die Gastfamilie sprach kein Englisch, war aber sehr nett und hilfsbereit. Wir konnten jeden Morgen ein leckeres und frisch zubereitetes Frühstück (Brötchen, Spiegeleier, Nudelsuppe, Obst) bestellen, kostenloser Tee inklusive.
Von den Stränden der Insel hat uns am besten der Monkey-Beach gefallen.
Unser Tandem konnten wir sicher anschließen.

reviews.title: Ausgezeichnet!
reviews.positives: Die Familie war extrem freundlich und hilfsbereit. Sie haben für einen die Fährtickets gebucht und einem vom Hafen abgeholt und zum Hafen gebracht. Die Lage war fantastisch wenige Gehminuten von den Restaurants und 10 Minuten vom Strand entfernt. Man konnte sehr einfach Roller über sie ausleihen für einen fairen Preis. Es gab kostenlos Trinkwasser und das Zimmer war sehr sauber und bequem.
reviews.negatives: Nichts

reviews.title: Mega nette Gastgeber und süßes Homestay
reviews.positives: Die Unterkunft liegt zwar etwas außerhalb, man ist jedoch nach ca. 20 Minuten zu Fuß in der Stadt. Die Unterkunft hat ein mega Preis-Leistungsverhältnis. Besonders hervorzuheben ist die Gastgeberin. Sie ist extrem zuvorkommend und hilfsbereit und bemüht sich wirklich sehr ihre Gäste wo es nur geht zu unterstützen! Danke für die tolle Zeit! Wir kommen gerne wieder! :)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Vân und ihre Familie sind außergewöhnlich herzliche und zuvorkommende Gastgeber*innen :) 
Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt!  
Vân kocht lecker und hat sich ganz liebevoll auch um unseren Wünsche, vegan zu essen, gekümmert. 
Sie haben für uns die Boottickets besorgt und uns sowohl zum Anleger gebracht, als auch abgeholt :) 
Das Zimmer war sauber, das Bett sehr bequem und das Wasser in der Dusche heiß. 

Zu allem was man auf der Insel machen kann haben sie mindestens eine Empfehlung oder bringen einen, in unserem Fall zum Schnorcheln. Ob des Wellengangs konnten wir leider nicht mit dem Boot rausfahren, was sie normalerweise anbieten. 

Es gab wegen des Wetters etwas hin und her mit dem Speedboot. Luc, Vâns Sohn, hat uns immer sehr schnell informiert und uns auch sonst mit allen nötigen Infos versorgt. 

Kommunikation mit Google translate und unseren rudimentären Vietnamesisch-Kentnissen hat prima geklappt. 

Wir haben uns sehr willkommen gefühlt und würden gern wieder kommen.

reviews.title: Schönes kleines Hotel in top Lage mit supernetten Besitzern!
reviews.positives:
Super Lage, man ist in 5 Minuten zu Fuß am Hafen. 
Die Zimmer sind gemütlich eingerichtet und es gibt eine kleine Terrasse.
Die Gastgeberfamilie ist sehr nett und man bekommt dort günstiges und gutes Essen. Man kann direkt im Hotel Roller mieten und Schnorchel ausleihen.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives: Immagino che le homestay siano tutte così su questa isola,comoda come posizione,camera piccolissima senza spazio per gli zaini e bagno che lasciava molto a desiderare

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives:
La cordialità della signora, anche se non parla inglese; la terrazza; autenticità del posto.
Consigliato se volete fare un'esperienza autentica, presso una famiglia locale. A noi è piaciuto molto, per una notte va assolutamente bene.
reviews.negatives:
Ci hanno dato una stanza diversa da quella prenotata, abbiamo prenotato una matrimoniale, ci hanno dato una quadrupla, forse perché hanno poche stanze ( lo accetto solo per questo motivo e perché siamo stati comunque bene)
Se non amate i cani, considerate che c'è uno che gironzola per casa.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
La cucina della proprietaria e la sua gentilezza. 
Balcone e area esterna alla camera.
reviews.negatives: Stanze troppo strette.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: la famiglia che gestisce l'homestay è disponibile e gentilissima, abbiamo mangiato da loro la sera ed il cibo era buonissimo, pescato e cucinato direttamente da loro.
reviews.negatives: Camera troppo piccola

reviews.title: Una cena km 0
reviews.positives: Proprietari gentilissimi. Mi hanno procurato loro i biglietti dei traghetti in motoscafo e mi sono venuti a prendere al mollo. La proprietaria è una signora squisita, mi ha cucinato con le sue proprie mani la cena con i pesci che ha pescato suo marito e figlio, buonissimi i suoi piatti. Consiglio assolutamente il posto!
reviews.negatives: La bici che mi hanno noleggiato era messa veramente male.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: La disponibilità e la gentilezza dello staff.
reviews.negatives: In assoluto la pecca principale riguarda il bagno poco confortevole.

reviews.title: Struttura accogliente
reviews.positives: Proprietari molto gentili. Ci hanno tenuto i bagagli anche dopo il check out per permetterci di fare ancora un giro per l’isola.
reviews.negatives: Letto con materasso un po’ troppo rigido

reviews.title: Bel posto
reviews.positives: Struttura essenziale con un ottimo rapporto qualità prezzo. I proprietari sono gentilissimi e disponibili per qualsiasi esigenza.
reviews.negatives: Nulla

reviews.title: Isola stupenda, ancora poco turistica. La gente del luogo è veramente gentilissima.
reviews.positives: Isola bellissima. L'homestay è vicina alla spiaggia principale, che è un po' affollata durante la mattina per i tour che arrivano da Hoi An, ma nel pomeriggio è spettacolare. I proprietari sono super gentili, ci hanno accompagnato in motorino alla spiaggia di Stone Giant, che è veramente spettacolare. anche la cena che ci hanno preparato è stata veramente ottima e abbondante.
reviews.negatives: le camere sono un po' strette e può capitare di trovare qualche insetto, ma niente di esagerato. Su tutta l'isola manca un punto dove prelevare e quasi da nessuna parte prendono la carta.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Posizione e consigli dei gestori ‘ molto disponibili
reviews.negatives: Forse un po’ piccole e basic le stanze ma per il prezzo richiesto ottimo rapporto

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
I proprietari sono molto gentili e disponibili, ti fanno sentire in famiglia. Camere piccoline ma pulite ed un magnifico terrazzo in  comune . Possibiltà di avere colazione e pasti a prezzi onesti. La signora cucina divinamente. 
Bellissima spiaggia di sabbia bianca vicinissima alla struttura.
reviews.negatives: Andarmene 😢

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Homestay genuina ma pulita e comoda. Proprietari gentilissimi e ottime colazioni.
reviews.negatives: Non adatto a chi cerca un resort, ma l’isola è genuina proprio per questo.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Personale gentilissimo !! Struttura super consigliata

reviews.title: Authentieke homestay waar je het Vietnamese leven en de hartelijkheid kunt ervaren.
reviews.positives: Heel vriendelijke host die alles voor ons kon organiseren. Zelfs eenverjaardagstaartje bij het ontbijt heel vroeg met de boot bezorgt vanuit Hoi An omdat er op Cham island geen bakkers zijn. We konden de scooters van het appartement gebruiken. En werden vanaf de boot met scooters opgehaald waarbij al onze bagage op de scooter werd gehezen en wij met nog een kind voor op erachter. Het eiland is heel authentiek en rustig. Verwacht geen westerse standaarden van de accommodatie maar ervaar het Vietnamese leven en hartelijkheid.

reviews.title: Genoten op een heerlijk eiland!
reviews.positives: De kleinschaligheid en de ontzettend lieve mensen. Mevrouw Van kan echt super lekker koken, aanrader om tenminste een keer in de homestay te eten. De Chill coffeeshop van haar dochter is ook een aanrader, de coconot coffee is fantastisch. Locatie van de homestay ook top, op loopafstand van allerlei restaurantjes en de haven.

reviews.title: Fantastisch
reviews.positives: Hele lieve mensen Voelde als familie Helpen je met alles Very nice people felt like family Help you with everything They heard it was my bday and bought a cake for me and sang to me !!!they arange tickets en drive you to the beautiful beaches on the lovely iland!!!
reviews.negatives: Alles was simpel maar prima voor de prijs en schoon

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Giá cả quá phải chăng, cô chú chủ nhà thân thiện
reviews.negatives: Nhà vệ sinh hơi có mùi

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Gần trung tâm, chủ thân thiện, hỗ trợ đón và chở ra đón tàu. Suất ăn ở home cũng đầy đủ và ngon miệng. 🥰

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Gia đình cô chủ dễ thương, tốt bụng

reviews.title: Khá tốt
reviews.positives: Cô chủ và anh chủ nhiệt tình, nấu ăn ngon, hợp miệng
reviews.negatives:
Để cạnh tranh với các homestay khác nên giảm giá tiền suất ăn, hoặc đặt ra các mâm thức ăn với giá cụ thể. Mình đc ăn suất 70k ngon nhưng mà nhiều quá, ko ăn hết, giảm xuống thì sẽ hợp lý hơn
Nên đưa ra các ưu điểm của homestay như Cho thuê xe 1 ngày và có thể quá giờ một ít, có cho ở miễn phí phòng thêm vài tiếng để khách hàng lưu ý ưu điểm của Homestay

reviews.title: tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: sạch và rất nhiệt tình . đồ ăn ngon chất lượng giá hợp lý

reviews.title: A wonderful and memorable local experience!
reviews.positives:
The homestay was very homey and I could really enjoy the local atmosphere.
Especially, the mother was so kind she took me around the island by bike and cooked delicious meals for me. I had such a wonderful time here!

Homestay rất ấm cúng và tôi đã có thể tận hưởng bầu không khí địa phương.
Đặc biệt, mẹ rất thân thiện — mẹ đã chở tôi đi khắp đảo bằng xe máy và nấu cho tôi nhiều món ăn ngon. Tôi đã có khoảng thời gian thật tuyệt vời ở đây!

reviews.title: Tốt
reviews.positives: Chủ nhà rất nhiệt tình hỗ trợ , thuê xe máy đổ đầy xăng không cần tiền mà chỉ tt tiền thuê xe , đồ hải sản ngon ,

reviews.title: 9 điểm
reviews.positives: Gia đình chủ home rất thân thiện và nhiệt tình

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Đồ ăn ngon, dịch vụ tuyệt vời, ng dân thân thiện

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Cô chủ dui tính, nấu ăn ngon vl:3 rẻ nữa. Trước  nhà cô là quán Cf của con cô cũng rất ngon. Chill cf.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Gia đình thân thiện, nhiệt tình. Cô chủ  Vân nấu ăn rất ngon

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Атмосфера деревни, флора и фауна, кристальное море в минутах 20 ходьбы.
reviews.negatives: Трубы протекают, маленький санузел, все намокает, но выдают тапочки для санузла.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Хозяева очень гостеприимные! Они давно принимают гостей, и знают, что нам нужно) Расположение удобное, 5 минут до набережной. Матрас очень хороший, спина отдыхает. Приятный общий балкон, есть чайник, можно утром попить кофе. Спасибо, что принимаете гостей на вашем чудесном острове!
reviews.negatives: Комната очень маленькая, а кондиционер большой. В первую ночь я замёрзла, потому что он над головой. Потом мы смогли его настроить.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Было достаточно уютно, до моря минут 5 пешком, хозяева приветливые, в комнате есть кондиционер и санузел

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Хорошее расположение, очень милые и внимательные хозяева

reviews.title: Уютный дом
reviews.positives: Отличный гостевой дом!Гостеприимная хозяйка.Хотя и не говорят на английском,во всём помогают.Был всего одну ночь,но мне даже подарили сувенир брелок.Спасибо! Всё было супер!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Семья замечательная. Условия конечно, очень скромные. Но есть где спать, есть кондиционер, есть где помыться. У меня сложилось впечатление, что была у родственников в деревне. Это так здорово. Открытые, отзывчивые и самое главное они на тебя не смотрят как на ходячий кошелёк, как это было в самом Хойан. Спасибо большое))))

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Väldigt rar och trevlig värdinna.
reviews.negatives: Väldigt hård säng även för att vara i Vietnam

reviews.title: Bra!
reviews.positives:
Älskar ön! Så mysig plats, och boendet gjorde resan bättre! Det var hemtrevligt och personalen var snäll och hjälpsam! Sängarna var rätt hårda men man vande sig, det var bra städat men vid ett tillfälle fick vi inte igång duschen och inget vatten kom - men de va snabba på att fixa det vilket var väldigt bra! 

Boendet hade även bra läge till ”hamnen” (ca 5 minuters gång) och till de olika stränderna. :)

reviews.title: Na krótki pobyt może być
reviews.positives: Lokalizacja, sympatyczni , pomocni właściciele
reviews.negatives: Karaluchy biegały po pokoju , pościel niezbyt czysta

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Fantastisk vært!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Familien var super sød, god stemning og hyggelig beliggenhed.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Hyggeligt og fredeligt sted, tæt på strand og tilgængelig stor balkon. Vi blev hentet ved færgen og fik serveret en lækker morgenmad. Blev 2 nætter mere end beregnet.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Van ser molt acollidores i sobretot, ens van fer arribar tot de recomanacions de què fer a l'Illa ja que pràcticament no hi ha informació. 
ens explicaven on anar per veure corall, etc. 
ens ha agradat molt l'experiència!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: El personal de la casa són molt amables i agradables. Està situat quasi davant de mar i ens han ajudat amb la gestió d'algunes activitats. El noi de la casa ens va acostar al port quan marxàvem amb les motxilles. L'esmorzar molt correcte. Ens van llogar una moto per explorar l'illa.
reviews.negatives: Les habitacions són força petites, però qualitat - preu és molt correcte.

reviews.title: Good homestay, bad personal experiences
reviews.positives: Great location, a short walk to the Main beach Street in the village. The staff were wonderful and very friendly.
reviews.negatives: the shower was broken, and I got food poisoning from the food (not their fault but just a warning to others :-) )

reviews.title: Passable
reviews.positives: Value for money for a one night stay, the homestay very basic but it doesn’t bother us at all as we hang out all the time at the beach, owner son speak some English and he is kind enough to let us use the motorbike the next day to go to ferry pier for breakfast.
reviews.negatives: I was expecting motorbike rental in Chàm island should be cheaper than Da Nang and Hoi An, we pay 150K a day with the same cost we get a better, newer motorbike in Hoi An than in the homestay, the motorbike we had was quite old and have problem to start the engine all the time.

reviews.title: Authentic Homestay Experience with Minor Trade-offs
reviews.positives:
You’ll be staying in a homestay with the family, which is a great choice if you’re looking for a more local, authentic experience. Everyone was very attentive and eager to help in any way they could. Their son speaks some English and even reached out in advance via WhatsApp to ask if I needed help getting there or had any questions—much appreciated!

I was able to borrow a snorkel set for free and rent a scooter for 150,000 VND per day (including gasoline), which was super convenient.

The room is small and basic, but fairly clean with some details—like stained mirrors, or dusty corners, and the fan. The mattress was the typical firm Vietnamese style, which might not be ideal if you prefer a softer bed. A/C and hot water worked well.

They offer à la carte breakfast and dinner at a very fair price, and I enjoyed eating there.

The price-to-value ratio felt a bit off to me this time, though that’s probably due to the generally higher prices on Cham Island compared to the mainland.
reviews.negatives:
The Wi-Fi was unfortunately very unreliable—it kept disconnecting and reconnecting, which made it hard to use.

I might have caught it at a busy time, as my stay coincided with a Vietnamese bank holiday. In the evening, there were lots of kids running around, and the adult guests had a karaoke session that went on until the 10 pm curfew. Totally understandable, but not ideal if you’re hoping for a quiet evening or need to get to sleep early.

reviews.title: A fair stay.
reviews.positives: The room was simple but clean and equipped with all the basic supplies. The position is central and they rent motorbikes, the perfect and easiest way to explore the island.
reviews.negatives: staff doesn't speek English very well, it was a bit hard to communicate with them. But they were all very kind.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Attentive and caring owner, Breakfast and Dinners are creative and every day different using all local Foods. Location is convenient, 5 min walk from Ferry Terminal

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nice homestay on the island with helpful owners and a good menu to choose from!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
We were happy to stay with this very friendly family. Expect a Vietnamese home - not a hotel.

Ve loved the next door coffee shop, from where they can bring a great morning coffee (the best cold, white Vietnamese coffee we had in Vietnam).

We rented motorbikes - one needed a bit of air in the tire - and they were fast to bring it to a repair shop - great!
reviews.negatives: The beds are more firm than we are used to.

reviews.title: i really liked the family that run this place, even tho communication wasnt always easy they always helped with a smile
reviews.positives: location just out side of town very quiet

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
service:
- the family is very nice and helpful. organized the speedboat beforehand. they did even picked me up from the harbour after arrival. 
- they offer evey meal and renting a motorbike for a reasonable price.
- communication through translation app.

equiptement:
- no watercooker. 
- very good honda bike (automatic). 
- (at least in my room) the electrical plug was far from the bed and had a loose connection.
- everything else is offered.

location and envirement:
- good location  in the center of the main villege
- buitiful nature, some buitiful beaches, quite good roads
- be aware of difficult night because of the singing chickens (some at the night, some early morning) and the play of recorded speeches with big speakers at 5:30 am.
- be aware of a miliary station in Bai Huong. when you want to drive around the island google maps leads you though that miliary station. when you see a barrier dont pass it, even if the turnpike is up and the entrance is open. dont enter any miliary station or area in vietnam even if its easily accessible. its a offense! the locals know where you can go, where not. dont trust google.better to inform yourself where not to go when you arrive. only ask that nothing more.

overall: very good service. good price-performance-ratio.
reviews.negatives: see above

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: the lady of the house doesn't speak much English, but she tries to communicate.  we got a room with big beds, fan and air conditioning.  there is a nice balcony.
reviews.negatives: unnecessarily expensive range of products from the fridge.  Quite expensive catering for my taste.  otherwise it was very pleasant

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Super kind and  friendly hosts. We managed to communicate using google translate. They kindly gave us their scooter so that we could explore the island. 
We enjoyed our meals there and the food was delicious.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Friendly and helpful people. Good location. Good food.
reviews.negatives: The mattress was very hard.

reviews.title: Your homestay in the amazing Cham island
reviews.positives: Great location and amazing host. She was super friendly and helped us out whenever we needed.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Quiet location, nice balcón y with seaview.
reviews.negatives: Matress little bit Hard.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The family was very friendly it was clean. The location was perfect.

reviews.title: Nice shelter for a Cham island explore
reviews.positives: Was a perfect room for a night to stay in Cham. Place was nice, owners doesn't speak English unfortunately but still managable. Room was a a bit crowded as a twin room for 2 huge beds, but it was ok.

reviews.title: Lovely family Homestay
reviews.positives: Lovely family Homestay who sorted out our speedboat smoothly and transfers. We hired a bike from them too and explored the island. It was so lovely in Cham we booked another day/night with the owners, no problem! Had drinks available and great location.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
My stay with Van, Duc and Luc was fantastic. Only hiccup was some air conditioner issues which they tried to fix but the problem continued so they moved me to another room.
The location of the homestay is perfect...a 5 minute walk from the pier and 15 minute walk to either of two beaches.
Breakfast and dinner is available on order. I highly recommend eating at the homestay...fish, soup, rice and noodle dishes were all delicious.

On checking out Luc invited me to join the family for lunch. So special to be thought of as part of the family.
Thank you so much for your hospitality.
I wish I could've stayed longer.
Highly recommend.
Paul
reviews.negatives: Not a thing...all good

reviews.title: Lovely and friendly homestay to enjoy the peace of this Cham island
reviews.positives:
We loved our stay at this family home stay. They came to pick us up at the ferry. They even invited us to share a lunch with them. 
The room was clean. However a bit small for 3 people. The beds were kind of hard but good for one night.
The homestay is located 15 minutes walk to the beach. And they lend you snorkeling equipment for free.

reviews.title: we came during the week before Tet and the family welcomed us to their celebration lunch (making a special effort to pro
reviews.positives: The family were such a delight and despite the communication barrier they really made an effort to make sure we were happy and comfortable. The room was nice and clean with a lovely balcony just outside. Great location just a five minute walk from the port and recommended coffee shop near by

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: It was great experience to stay with the owners of the house. They are great people, helping all the time. Breakfast was delicious and we really enjoyed our holiday.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Nice homestay with friendly owners.
Good location

reviews.title: Amazing!!! Cham island was such a great experience and staying in this home stay was a wonderful highlight to the experi
reviews.positives: Kind and friendly people, located close to the pier and quick walk to beaches. The food Van cooked at the home stay was amazing, amazing!!! Comes with extra options like snorkelling gear hire and snorkelling boat trip and also an option to hire a bike to trip around the island. Highly recommend.
reviews.negatives: Only thing I can put as a downside was that the mattress was a bit hard.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Lovely homestay. Such kind beautiful family that make you feel at home

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: really sweet and caring host

reviews.title: Would highly recommend
reviews.positives: Was great family so helpful!!!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The nicest hosts, very accommodating
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Super friendly and fancy room.
reviews.positives: Friendliest family. Very kind hosts and the room was great value for money with big bed and ac. They even have me a pair of flip flops after o lost my sandals.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Love this place!!! The family that owns the homestay is lovely. The location is perfect. 10 minutes walking to the pier and to a beautiful beach. Good shower. Very clean. Delicious coffee and smoothies!!! It has a nice balcony with a sea view. Best place to stay in Cham island!!!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: very helpful and sweet! + great view from the balcony

reviews.title: Lovely and peaceful
reviews.positives: Fabulous homestay, the hosts were lovely and so friendly and welcoming. The homestay was a 4 minute walk from the dock and in a nice quiet area. I stayed in a double room which was clean, comfortable and had a good working AC unit. The surrounding area is very pretty with fields out of the window. It was quiet and peaceful. The hosts gave advice on things to do on the island which was really helpful, and they offer food as well! I had very restful break here and would recommend to everyone.
reviews.negatives: Nothing to dislike, was great!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Hanh was amazing! She made us feel like home and helped us getting around. She also made us an amazing ginger tea. 
Amazing experience and amazing host

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The hosts are truly exceptional, treating me like family and going above and beyond with their genuine warmth and attentive hospitality. The property is also perfectly situated, offering effortless access to local gems while providing a peaceful retreat.

reviews.title: 100% would come again!
reviews.positives: Very lovely accommodating family, picked us up from the port and helped us rent motorcycles for our 2 days there. Perfect distance from the main waterfront and really nice town. The island was so fun to explore. Thank you for a lovely stay!
reviews.negatives: Nothing!!!

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.positives: Very authentic homestay, like staying with a family. The owner is very kind and helpful. Excellent location.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Amazing stay with a lovely family. Walking distance to getting the boat from Hoi An and to the beach, restaurants, markets etc. Can rent a motor bike. I didn’t eat at the homestay but i hear they do great meals. Hosts were super helpful in booking my boat and making sure I got there on time!! 
Even gave me a leaving gift 😀

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: 1000% recommended! The owners are very kind and helpful. They helped us to buy tickets for a boat, after arriving they waited on us in the port. Room was cleaned and comfy. You can choose from variety of tasty and fresh meals and drinks. You can rent a motorbike there, snorkles and other activities. In the end we even got a little present.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The host were very kind and helpful! They offer a great menu, we ate most of our meals at the homestay and the fish was delicious. Highly recommended!

reviews.title: The best Homestsy I’ve stayed in, so friendly, and comfortable. The food was amazing and cheap. Definitely stay here for
reviews.positives: A brilliant place to stay. It’s a family owned property and they’re so friendly. Great location between 2 beaches. We had 1 meal there and it was delicious. A fantastic experience. 5 minute walk from the ferry port. The family picked took us back to the ferry port when it was time to leave the island. We hired a motorcycle from them too.
reviews.negatives: Nothing to dislike.

reviews.title: We would highly recommend this Homestay egebyou head to The Cham Island.
reviews.positives: The family that own the Homestay were so lovely. We had the whole top floor as our parents were with us as well as our 2 kids. We were made to feel like it was our home. The food was amazing too.
reviews.negatives: Nothing to be honest.

reviews.title: Stay for a few days - beautifully warm hosts, spectacular island!
reviews.positives: Everything

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Very kind owner, delicious food and cosy space.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The friendliness of the host and location

reviews.title: Lovely and chill moment
reviews.positives:
Van & duc were si Nice and Lovely !
I loved my time there, i recommend everyone to go there to have a lovely immersion in their family :)

reviews.title: Like a family
reviews.positives: t was one of the best experiences in Vietnam. The owners, Van and Duc, picked us up at the port on a scooter. The house is very simple, let's remember that we are an island, but it has all the necessary comforts. The thing that has absolutely no value is the availability and kindness of the owners. Always ready to satisfy every request, from scooter rental to the excellent dinners they prepared for us. I absolutely recommend it because it will be like feeling at home.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: homely, cheap and ideal location.
reviews.positives: great value for money and honestly the host couldn’t have been more helpful. even when i left she was helping me with stuff and also did so much to organise the trip. house is lovely also and very friendly. would highly recommend this homestay.
reviews.negatives: nothing but good things to say.

reviews.title: Authentic Local Experience at Vân Đức Homestay
reviews.positives: I appreciated the honesty and friendly manners of the entire family. They were also very helpful with everything we needed. The room prices are excellent, and you won’t find such rates anywhere else in the world. The location of Vân Đức Homestay is very convenient, allowing you to easily reach any part of Cham Island. It’s amazing that for such a small amount of money, you can enjoy one of the most exotic islands on earth. If you want to experience the warm hospitality of the Vietnamese people, I highly recommend staying at Vân Đức Homestay.
reviews.negatives: NA

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Incredibly friendly and helpful hosts

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Everything 
Very friendly manager

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: It's a lovely place near the port, at arrival they come to pick you up by motor bike. Location is near Ong beach, 5-10 minutes walk. For Xep and Stone beach it's better to rent a motor bike, they offer that service at homestay for 200k dong/day (with gas). They offer deliceous food, we ate breakfasts and one dinner (the fish we specially recommend). The room has fan and AC so no worries for heat.
reviews.negatives: There are some small things, but as others said, you are not staying at 5 star hotel, but you have okay place to sleep.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great place, friendly hosts, helped with all transfers. Good location, quiet at night.

reviews.title: Simple accommodation in a beautiful location with butterflies, monkeys and excellent seafood.
reviews.positives: It was great to be picked up from the port. Every question and every request was dealt with speedily via google translate. Cham Island is a very special place. Please don't expect five star luxury but do expect kind people who will look after you well.

reviews.title: Lovely small but memorable home stay on beautiful island
reviews.positives:
The lovely balcony where we could relax and read. The home cooked dinner was delicious with lots of local dishe s fresh seafood. Breakfast also good - 3 fried ewggs and warm baguette.
The hosts were very friendly and invited us out in the evening as well as to go watch the sunrise. We were given a free ride to the harbour to catch our boat. 😊
reviews.negatives: The room a little small with two double beds in, basic but was clean.

reviews.title: Really lovely family and good location
reviews.positives: Great value for money, good location and the whole family are really lovely. The host is an amazing cook (always say yes if she offers you lunch or dinner), her son and husband are extremely helpful. They don't speak much English but with some help from Google translate, they will do their best to help you. They also picked me up and dropped me off at the pier which was very helpful.
reviews.negatives:
There was a loud noise outside the room at times, I think it was some kind of pump? But thankfully not during the night.
The mattress is also quite hard but that didn't bother me.

reviews.title: A beautiful stay on a lovely quiet island - thank you so much.
reviews.positives: What a WONDERFUL stay at this lovely homestay. The room was clean with excellent air conditioning, there was a little balcony overlooking the harbour which was lovely. The owners were absolutely lovely - I had a massive and delicious meal including fresh fish on both nights (I would definitely recommend eating here!). On my final day, they woke up at 4:45AM to drive me up to the viewing point to see the sunrise - what a special moment. They truly went above and beyond and I was so sorry to leave - even though they spoke little English (and I speak no Vietnamese!) I really felt so at home here.

reviews.title: heartwarming and welcoming homestay with delicious meals everyday
reviews.positives: The heart of the homestay is it’s owner, Vân. She is very friendly and wholesome and she helped me with everything, from booking my ferry back, making me delicious dinner and even drove me around the island with her motorbike. I really felt like was with family which was very nice for a long time traveler.

reviews.title: A perfect summer getaway, relaxing and quiet.
reviews.positives: The hosts were beautiful and generous people, the facilities were clean, aircon in each bedroom.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The room wa comfortable, and good location. The owner was very friendly and helpful. She cooked very well, and we had an amazing lunch with seafoods. Highly recommend. We will come back soon.

reviews.title: A volver
reviews.positives: Anfitrión excelente.
